meaning: adj.显出(或感到)惊奇,觉得奇怪,疑惑的
examples: I'm wondering whose mother she is then.
I was just wondering if you could help me.
Jane had been wondering that selfsame thing.
And I'm wondering if there is something, also, that comes out of indigenous New Zealand culture.
Went on my way feeling strange all that day, wondering what had gone wrong.
